name: repo-wiki
description: LLM Wiki pattern for code repos. Init scans the entire src/ tree for complete entity coverage and seeds each module with its recent commits, plus a bounded global git scan; full-history era backfill is opt-in (init full-history). Grow the knowledge base incrementally from changes or conversational context (ingest, polymorphic), and query it with natural language (query) — Eager src/ verification at key moments. Knowledge lives in a hidden .repo-wiki/ directory committed alongside your code; src/ remains the source of truth. Zero external dependencies — pure SKILL.md, no MCP servers or vector stores.
